markets.title: Will Scottie Scheffler win the The Open Championship?
markets.rules_primary: If Scottie Scheffler wins the The Open Championship, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: If a golfer forfeits, withdraws, or does not participate prior to teeing off, their Tournament Winner contract will resolve to No.

markets.title: Will Alex Noren win the The Open Championship?
markets.rules_primary: If Alex Noren wins the The Open Championship, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: If a golfer forfeits, withdraws, or does not participate prior to teeing off, their Tournament Winner contract will resolve to No.
